ux_issues.description: UpdateTrip response omits 'themes' field, but GetTrip includes it. Minor inconsistency between the two responses for the same trip.
ux_issues.suggestion: UpdateTrip response should include all fields that GetTrip returns for consistency.

ux_issues.description: GetItinerary after trip deletion returns an error message 'get trip: no rows in result set' which leaks internal implementation details. Should return a cleaner 'not_found' message like GetTrip does.
ux_issues.suggestion: Wrap the internal error and return a user-friendly 'trip not found' or 'itinerary not found' message.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Full lifecycle CRUD stress test passed all 14 steps. COALESCE partial updates work correctly -- updating title preserves description and vice versa. Status transitions preserve all fields. Booking ingestion parsed the Delta flight correctly with confirmation code, provider, and flight details. Share token lifecycle works: enable returns a working public URL, disable correctly returns 404. Cascade deletion is clean -- trip, bookings, and itinerary all removed. The AI created itinerary items via create_itinerary_items tool as expected. No P0 or P1 bugs found.
